name: Authentic Carolina Pork Barbeque
recipeIngredient: 1 ¼ ounces crushed red pepper flakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all sauce ingredients together. Use as a basting sauce for the meat.
2. The pork has to be barbecued – that is, cooked long and slow over a real wood fire, preferably hickory.
3. Maintain the temperature around 220 degrees Fahrenheit. It takes at least 1-1/2 hours per pound, or until the internal temperature reaches 150-160 degrees.
4. Serve on a Cheap White Bun (CWB).
5. After that, the only question is whether to serve it with or without sweet cole slaw on top.
